about.mission_text: Monarch Report is an independent media platform focused on delivering investigative journalism and news from South Korea and broader East Asia. We serve as a watchdog for human rights — emphasizing religious freedom, freedom of speech, and protection against government overreach.
about.value_truth_desc: We share facts, not narratives. Every claim is sourced and verifiable.
about.value_freedom_desc: We defend the God-given right to worship, believe, and practice faith without persecution.
about.value_watchdog_desc: We hold power accountable. When governments overreach, we report it.
about.meta_description: Learn about Monarch Report's mission to protect God-given rights through investigative truth sharing.
